entry.title: Use of Sequence into SAP B1 / SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi all,

What is the use of "Sequence" in SAP B1 OR SAP Business One?

 What are the benefits of Sequence used into document? 

 

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Can we configure a custom branding of the IAS after login ?
entry.content: I understand that we can customize the login page through a CSS file. However, I would also like to customize the appearance after login.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately this condition is not working: !(ContextObject.FileName CP "*12345*")

I get the following error:
Lexical error at line 1, column 4. Encountered: "d" (100), after : "Con"

I tried it already with Not and != symbols as well...

entry.title: Re: Competencies from SF PM to SAP CDP
entry.content: Any thoughts from the Experts.

entry.title: Re: Dividing GC results by Thousands and Rounding
entry.content:
Hi Florian,

Returning to the question – I created a translation ratio for 2 currencies of 1000:1 (AVG and CLO exchange Rates 1:1) so that the GC result includes the decimal.

If we want a rounded result like column F from currency translation or another Group Reporting solution is that possible?

I reviewed the 3 rounding steps and they make sense but they don’t activate in this example since the translation result coming into GC is balanced. Thanks in advance.

Regards

Eyal

entry.title: Re: RFC registered program
entry.content: This is totally clear. The interesting point is how to setup the connection of the RFC-Server to the SAP system. But obviously the requester could solve the problem with my earlier answer. Finally this is not a matter of trusting.

entry.title: Re: CCM - Settlement to multiple agents - No Supplier to...
entry.content:
Hi Kmrharish, 

How did you disable the supplier field? 
To have multiple customer/supplier for a contract, it's not only a question of "disabling" the customer/supplier owner of the contract, there are several distinctions with a single customer/supplier contract --> Please review the Standard Configuration guide. 

Make sure to change the "Type of contract partner" to "No contract partner" 
If you are based on Billing document and you have added LIFNR as split criteria, it will most likely not work as you don't have LIFNR populated in a billing document, please select the relevant field in the source document for Partner Settlement determination.

If you implement this scenario, make sure that the business know the consequences of using a Multiple partners contract, such as: 
1. Settlement for all partners or nothing 
2. Reversal for a specific settlement date for all partners or nothing, even if it was only an error on 1 document
3. Standard scale will be calculated for every single document and partner (not cumulated unless specific configuration) 
4. Settlement calendar will be the same for all partners 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: SAC Story Filters: Advanced Filtering with BW Live Data
entry.content: Hello Martin, "widget" means any components which is either chart or table, etc. on the story.  "Complex filter" I think they meant Advanced Filtering. There are four different types of filters for SAC stories: Story- Filter, Page- Filter, Widget-Filter, Column- Filter. Please check out Filtering options in SAP Analytics Cloud Story Design by @Johann  and also How to Filter Data in Your Stories: SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

Thank you for your response...

I selected the Receiver 2 as a default Receiver and when I test it with 2 receiver it works 

But I didnt think it would matter but there is also another Receiver where all file should go to. 

So when I add this receiver (receiver 3) than the files dont go to default receiver (Receiver 2) anymore. 

Any idea why is that? And how to solve it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hello John,

"Select the Following Receiver" option is located in Integrated Configuration. In iFlow in NWDS, you can use the "Default Receiver" selection under "Routing Behaviour".

Can you try entering the xpath query as shown in the picture?

Caner.

entry.title: sap.m Table image as barcode
entry.content:
Hello,

I am displaying a barcode per line item in a Table.

In the event 'updateFinished' I am looping the table and using a formatter to create a barcode based on another table column's value.

The problem is that all the images are overwritten with the last one as shown below?.

Does anybody know why's that happening?.

Thanks,

Javier

Hi Abfg, 

Did you get any comments or advice from SAP regarding this issue? We are also experiencing this problem/use-case. 

Kind regards, 

Yannick Meertens

entry.title: Re: How to utilize key user custom field "via CODE LIST"...
entry.content:
Hello Ai,

Could you please clarify your question?

Is it how to implement (concrete steps to take) or is it more looking for best practices?

Could you share more about the requirement?

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Partitioning a table in HANA using Range Partitioning...
entry.content:
Hi Shuvendu,

If you mean like this, then yes :
PARTITION 2016031400 <= VALUES < 2016031500, PARTITION OTHERS

"For heterogeneous range partitioning the numeric data types support negative and positive numbers"

PARTITION BY RANGE("TESTRESULT") ((PARTITION VALUES = 0), (PARTITION VALUES = -1), (PARTITION VALUES = -10), (PARTITION OTHERS));

 

Kind Regards
Simon

entry.title: Employee synch to Business Partner
entry.content: Hi experts: We are going to do system conversion from ECC 6 to S/4 HANA, We have employee vendors in an account group , but there is no personnel number updated in Vendor master (LFB1-PERNR is blank) in ECC system. and we plan to using custom BADI to change BP category as person(with vendor role) for those employee vendors (LFB1-PERNR is blank) during CVI in the pre conversion period. Afther SUM, during post conversion, we will run synchronisation program to synchronize the employee to the same BP(which created in pre conversion with vendor role). May I know if there is any potential risk for this approach? or we need maintain the personnel number in the vendor master and follow SAP standard BADI to do this? Best Regards Kane

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content:
The full code for the new certification is C_HAMOD_2024. It is available right now to book. It replaces C_HANAIMP and C_HCMOD. The associated learning content you should complete covers two topics for Data Engineer: Data Modeling and Data Provisioning. Make sure you study these before taking the exam. 

Data Modeling 
Take the Learning Journey - Developing Data Models with SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning
or
Take HA300 SAP HANA Data Modeling either instructor lead class, or self study using SAP Learning Hub.

Data Provisioning 
Take the Learning Journey - Provisioning Data to SAP HANA

entry.title: Convert GL Account Hierarchies from Fiori to Cost element Groups in SAP S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Currently, we are able to transfer from Cost elements group in SAP GUI into FIORI account hierarhies  using Replicate Runtime Hierarchy but not the other way around.

We are using both ECC and S4HANA systems.

We have currently the point that in our ECC Production System (Lets call it P04), we work with an cost element group, However in our S4HANA Production System (Lets call it P01) an account group created in FIORI with the app Manage Global hierarhcies.

For reporting reasons, we would like to have this created in P01 as cost element group as well and would like to avoid to create it manually.

THerfore the question if there is the possibility of having an automatic transfer of account groups from FIORI to S/4?

 

Thanks in advance!

Israa H.

entry.title: fiscal year and standard year in the same model in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
In a model, can I have two date dimensions, one standard and the other fiscal?
As far as I've researched, yes, but I would like to know if it is possible, for example, to use the standard date dimension to create data actions and, at the same time, use the fiscal year dimension as a column or filter in a table, in a same model?

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content: @MaiaraEllwanger, yes I did several times but to no avail! Last build attempt was at: 4/11/2024, 10:49:28 PM

entry.title: Fiori Elements App - With Intent Based Navigation doesn't get rendered
entry.content:
Dear experts,

This is my first question and I hope you can help me. I am developing a custom Fiori Elements app with CDS annotations and cannot get the intent based navigation to work.

I want a link from the business partner column to the custom business partner app:

Therefore I added the following annotation to the column in the CDS View:

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20, importance: #HIGH, type: #WITH_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, semanticObjectAction: 'display', criticality: 'GPStatusCriticality'}]
@Consumption.semanticObject: 'Z_GPM_SEM01'
GeschaeftspartnerID,

But it doesn't show a link or an error in the developer tools. I tried although with FOR_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION with no success.

Everything works fine if I try to open the semantic object with action manually by URL:
https://xxx/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/shells/abap/Fiorilaunchpad.html#Z_GPM_SEM01-display

The wanted app opens without problems. 

For the service ODATA V4 is used and beside the navigation problem everything works fine.
The UI5 Version is 1.96.28.

I would appreciate your help.

Best regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Your own S/4HANA sandbox at home?
entry.content: That is a very nice technical article, albeit the title is misleading. ABAP Platform Tial 1909 will get you ABAP tools to play around and get a test of what ABAP development is. However it will not get you S/4HANA, with all its business applications.

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content:
The full code for the new certification is C_HAMOD_2024. It is available right now to book. It replaces C_HANAIMP and C_HCMOD. The associated learning content you should complete covers two topics for Data Engineer: Data Modeling and Data Provisioning. Make sure you study these before taking the exam. 

Data Modeling 
Take the Learning Journey - Developing Data Models with SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning
or
Take HA300 SAP HANA Data Modeling either instructor lead class, or self study using SAP Learning Hub.

Data Provisioning 
Take the Learning Journey - Provisioning Data to SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: sap hana certification
entry.content: The full code for the new certification is C_HAMOD_2024. It is available right now to book. It replaces C_HANAIMP and C_HCMOD. The associated learning content you should complete covers two topics for Data Engineer: Data Modeling and Data Provisioning. Make sure you study these before taking the exam.  Data Modeling  Take the Learning Journey - Developing Data Models with SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Learning or Take HA300 SAP HANA Data Modeling either instructor lead class, or self study using SAP Learning Hub. entry.title: Re: How to utilize key user custom field "via CODE LIST"...
entry.content:
@Jerry_Lowery 
Good day ! and Thank you for your reply.
The business requirements are...

  1. to store custom fields into PL account line items in SAP system
  2. to post accounting documents both from external front systems and from manual input in SAP
  3. to have custom code list and its descriptions in SAP system for analytical reporting purpose
  4. to update the master data of the custom field code list and descriptions coming from external systems such as project system and budgeting/planning system 
  5. to enable the custom field value defined per company code, such as
    Company A - custom field YY_ZFI001 ... to be used for project code list
    Company B - custom field YY_ZFI001 ... to be used for budeting code list

I assume that the requirement other than last one should be covered by "key user extensibility".
But I am not sure if which technical option should suit the business requirement.

Thank you for your suppport and Kindly Regards,
Ai

entry.title: Re: RFC registered program
entry.content: The "setup the connection of the RFC-Server to the SAP system" does not change at all, when moving the RFC Server to a new IP address.

entry.title: Re: I cannot cancel an import in SAP Analytics Cloud from...
entry.content:
Hi @jlopezm,

SAP Analytics Cloud import job tries to get the query results in packages / sets with 10,000 in each. That's why LIMIT set 10,000. Why it's 10,000? I don't know! Check out System Sizing, Tuning, and Limits OFFSETT skipping records for each package / set. That's why it changes every time. 

So there must be a kind of parent job to trigger a next sub / child job whenever you canceled the previous one. You may run this and check all RUNNING jobs. Reference How to kill/stop jobs in HANA !! 

SELECT C.CONNECTION_ID, PS.STATEMENT_STRING
   FROM M_CONNECTIONS C JOIN M_PREPARED_STATEMENTS PS
        ON C.CONNECTION_ID = PS.CONNECTION_ID AND C.CURRENT_STATEMENT_ID = PS.STATEMENT_ID
  WHERE C.CONNECTION_STATUS = 'RUNNING'
    AND C.CONNECTION_TYPE = 'Remote'

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Different Email template based on payment
entry.content:
Hi s-shallah

First question, to confirm, how are you planning to distinguish between the two different type of recipients? Once this is known, we can design a solution

Are you planning to differentiate based on Billing Type?

Assuming yes, you would define the alternate email template in Maintain Email Templates - there are over 10,000 fields to choose from for the data source so should have all the data you need.

Once you have the template defined, the Output Parameter Determination app, Billing Document, Email settings will allow you to define the email template that is used. (see Best practice 1LQ for details).

here you would presumably add a filter based on the billing type

I hope this helps 

thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now setup
entry.content: newWindowSAML=true; should be removed from the SAP Companion configuration parameters. It brings an ugly user experience.

entry.title: FB60 does not post. No error message is displayed.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I try to post in FB60 but nothing happens (No error message is displayed nor a successful message)

I record FB60 and create a batch session via SHDB tc.

When processing the batch session via SM35 I receive an error message:

 

No batch input data for screen SAPMF05A 1100

Message no. 00344

 

I expected to receive the name of the problematic field, which causes the error, but I did not.

 

How can I know what is the problem.

Thankyou in advance

Hagit Samet

  •   BPCUSTOMER_MULTIPLE_ADDRESSES2

How we can deactivate them?

 

Thanks

entry.title: RAP - Manage Sales Orders - Version 2 (App ID F3893) pessimistic lock on Edit Button
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to understand how lock functionality is implemented in Manage Sales Orders - Version 2(App ID F3893) Fiori app by using pessimistic lock.

if user A is editing the document & then user B must get locking error when trying to edit the same document on edit button.

When user clicks on Edit button on object page, call goes to backend to check sales order is already locked or not. if it is locked then system is giving popup with error as it is already locked.

However not able to understand how this is integrated into this particular app. We want to implement similar functionality on Edit button.

Can someone help to understand how this is done in standard Fiori App (App ID F3893).

entry.title: Re: APM Capability: Adding Hold information to statements
entry.content:
Hi Jim,

You will need to add a subreport to your existing Jasper statement to capture the Held Transactions since the main statement driver query looks only for vouchered payments (Held Transactions are not vouchered).

The main components of the Held Section driver query will need to reference:

1. RunListNoHold: This value is stamped on the BrokerHistory records that were evaluated in the payout were the statement was generated.

2. RunListNoRoot: This value is the RunListNo of the Payout. This value is passed in a token from the Main Report of the statement to the new Hold section in Jasper.

3. VendorNo: VendorNo links the Held transactions to the Vouchered payments in the statement.

4. HoldStatus: The Held Section should only return Payments that are Held (HoldStatus=2)

The query will look something like below:

entry.title: Re: Error: "Instantiation of calculation model failed ......
entry.content:
Hi @MadhuLodugu,

If you use HANA Calculation Views as data source for your SAC Story / Model, you may need to re-generate / activate the Calculation View in HANA then try / test again; it may resolve the issue.  Error "306105: Invalid query" usually means there are missing things on HANA level as you triggered a sub query with filtering. 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Web preview api 500 error
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I can't gain access to my apps through the preview app. I keep getting a "api error 500" as shown below:

In fact, none of my apps are showing. They all missing in the preview app, but they show in the builder. @MaiaraEllwanger Can you please help me with this. I even created a new sap build apps account, and the same error happens. So I don't think it's my individual account.

entry.title: Annotation in SEGW
entry.content:
I have created a SEGW service  . I have enabled the filter options so that when i consume it in VS so that I automatically get those fields as filter parameters  .

 

 

But 

I have some CDS views which are also part of the same OData .I want them to be a value help on the same those filter parameter  .

I looked into  this blog  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/odata-annotations-in-segw-with-example-and-consume-it-in-visual-studio-to/ba-p/13551588

.Instead of this fixed values , I want the CDS to be displayed  or a table .

 

can anybody tell me what would be the right annotation for this .

entry.title: What is the best way to learn the core concepts and business processes of SAP S/4HANA Service?
entry.content:
We  recommend to access our Discovering SAP S/4HANA Service learning journey learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the core concepts and business processes of SAP S/4HANA Service.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, business users will be able to identify SAP Solutions for Service Processing.
Also business users will be able to describe the key functional areas of service in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.
In addition, business users will gain insights into overall business processes in S/4HANA Service.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Is it possible to call a SAP Query Transaction from another report and import to it the data?
entry.content:
I have a transaction that calls 'START_REPORT' and runs a SAP Query (type AQ) and generates some data.

I need to create another report. One step has to do exactly what the SAP Query report does. So far I'm thinking of calling the query report and exporting the generated data to the new Z report I'm working on. Is it possible? Otherwise I appreciate all your thoughts and tips.

entry.title: Re: CDS Compiler 4.8.0 rejects function & action return t...
entry.content:
Thank you for the response!

So until now this was just a gap to the odata spec? Interestingly, we hadn't had any issues with our CAP function that used such an array of arrays. You've mentioned that this change shifts the error detection to the left, where should the error have occured previously? When calling the request handler?

entry.title: Re: Don't want Posting Change Split from EWM to ERP
entry.content: I am facing the same ERRO above. Is there any idea to solve the problem?

entry.title: Re: CDS Compiler 4.8.0 rejects function & action return t...
entry.content: Also, this means it crashes the CAP backend since CAP tries to compile the service metadata on startup, right?

entry.title: Base value key for dep. calculate - ZA
entry.content:
Hi we have seen in the system - transaction AFAMS - in the multi-lve. metho. level under Base. Value 
a Baseline Value ZA = free for modification. 

I see the following info. 

Base value for depreciation calculation.

Along with the standard base values supplied by SAP, you can also use your own base value.  You define this user-specific base value using a customer enhancement (user exit) that has already been set up.

Does anyone have any idea which users already exist here? and where this is maintained?

many thanks

entry.title: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content:
Hi all,

my requirement is to set PO header field UNSEZ to a specific value when PO is saved.
Sounds easy but even after trying several suggestions from different posts I have no working solution.

I tried BAdI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST, but Methods PROCESS_HEADER and PROCESS_ITEM are only triggered when a header or item field is manually changed, and that is not always the case in my scenario.

I also tried Methods POST and CHECK, but I am not able to get changes saved on the database.
From different posts I use following code:

data: lr_po_handle type ref to cl_po_header_handle_mm.
data: ls_header type mepoheader.

* Disable firwall
lr_po_handle ?= im_header.
lr_po_handle->my_cust_firewall_on = mmpur_yes.

* Get header data
ls_header = im_header->get_data( ).

* Set value
ls_header-unsez = text-100.

* Set header data
im_header->set_data( ls_header ).
im_header->set_changed( ).

* Enable firewall
lr_po_handle->my_cust_firewall_on = mmpur_no.

This code will change the field UNSEZ on Dynpro, but will not persist change on database.

Are there any solution to this issue. 

Thanks E. Hasse

entry.title: Re: Auto dispute case for a chargeback through residual item
entry.content:
Hello,

Very useful information.

I have the same case here as @a_khan1. I need a solution for automatic dispute case creation on overdue line items. Does FDM_AUTO_CREATE transaction cover such a requirement?

 

Kind Regards,

MM

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors LMS Program - Can I add courses to an existing program?
entry.content:
@javtor,

When you add an Item to the program, there is an option to take into account the credits previously obtained for the item, based on the learning history of the learner. So, if this option is set for all items, when you reassign the program, the users won't have to retake the courses recently completed.

entry.title: Re: CDS Compiler 4.8.0 rejects function & action return t...
Re: CDS Compiler 4.8.0 rejects function & action return t...
entry.content:
I tried it with cds-compiler 4.7.6 and

  function foo() returns many test.manyString;
  type manyString : many String
 
This resulted in
  <Function Name="foo" IsBound="false" IsComposable="false">
    <ReturnType Type="Collection(test.manyString)" Nullable="false"/>
  </Function>
  <TypeDefinition Name="manyString" UnderlyingType="Edm.String"/>
 
The second "many" got lost when compiling to EDMX, meaning the service metadata claims that manyString actually is just a single string, so no array of arrays.
If you actually managed to respond with an array of arrays, then this is another bug that may need fixing.

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content:
Hello there.

I want to use ABAP2XLSX but my system have an old version of ABAP: 701.

I cannot activate the report ZABAPGIT_STANDALONE, it's using new syntax...

Any tip how to install ABAP2XLSX without ZABAPGIT ?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration with Slack
entry.content:
Hello Priyanka,

It is a nice blog. Ca you share how to send Direct Message to Slack?

entry.title: Receive a notification when your storage quota of SAP Cloud Transport Management passes 85%
entry.content:
If you are using SAP Cloud Transport Management service on SAP BTP, you might welcome a new option added this week to receive notifications when your storage quota has increased over the threshold of 85% of the total storage capacity. The actual notification is then sent via SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP.

This way, you can make sure to clean up your import queues in your transport landscape in time, before hitting your storage limit of your SAP Cloud Transport Management instance, which is currently 50 GB for our standard plan.

To clean up:

  • Either make sure to import transport requests in all import queues of your transport landscape (so the attached content gets deleted by the automatic cleanup mechanism of our service, after the retention time, which is 30 days for our standard plan),
  • Or remove outdated and obsolete transport requests from all import queues. Here, especially pay attention to transport requests in status Fatal, because the cleanup mechanism doesn't automatically delete them.

For more information on the capacity and cleanup of our persistency, see Background Information: Storage Capacity | SAP Help Portal.

To enable the notification, you first have to set up and connect SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP (if not already done, for other notification use cases) - and then just select the Enable Notification checkbox under  <Your e-mail address> --> My File Quota, as shown on the following screenshot:

Screenshot of the UI, showing how to navigate to the notification option.

 

For more information, on how to set up and connect SAP Alert Notification service and on how to enable specific notifications (also for the other events from SAP Cloud Transport Management you can get notifications for), see Receive Notifications for SAP Cloud Transport Management Actions Using SAP Alert Notification Service | SAP Help Portal. 

Please be aware that although you find the option for the storage quota notification underneath your email address in SAP Cloud Transport Management service, you will receive the notification via the channel defined in SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP (which might be email, Slack, Microsoft Teams, ...).

Also, this is not a personal notification, but you switch on the notification for the instance of SAP Cloud Transport Management, for which the storage limit does apply. If you should have several instances of SAP Cloud Transport Management, each instance would have a own storage limit. As a result, all recipients defined in SAP Alert Notification service for this storage quota event will get notified. For example, all members of a corresponding team in Microsoft Teams or of the Slack channel or on the specified distribution list, depending on the defined notification channel. 

We hope you find this new feature helpful for handling the delivery of your changes with SAP Cloud Transport Management service!

entry.title: Re: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi Caner,

I selected the Receiver 2 as a default Receiver and when I test it with 2 receiver it works 🙂

But I didnt think it would matter but there is also another Receiver where all file should go to. 

So when I add this receiver (receiver 3) than the files dont go to default receiver (Receiver 2) anymore. 

Any idea why is that? And how to solve it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: CCM - Settlement to multiple agents - No Supplier to...
entry.content:
Hello @gvictor,

Thanks for the response.

I have made the necessary configurations including the one which you have mentioned 'Make sure to change the "Type of contract partner" to "No contract partner"'. I am maintaining suppliers in BVS. Also, business is aware of points 1-4 mentioned by you.

In our billing document, we have partner function ES which has been assigned to LIFNR_COMMISSION. I have used LIFNR_COMMISSION in split criteria. Somehow by mistake, i posted a screenshot with LIFNR. 

When I do delta accruals instead of accruals from billing document (i.e, create invoices first and contract later), final settlement works fine.

Issue is only when accruals are from billing document and when final settlement is executed via WB2R_SV, then the error appears.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP ADT installation issue
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you had a chance to check out the installation guide? You can find it right here: Installing ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse.

If you're still having troubles after going through the guide, you could also open a ticket with the component BC-DWB-AIE. Hope this helps!

Best regards,
Armin

entry.title: Error by Logon eclipse
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunity, 

I have a free Trail account . I am currently facing a problem while trying to log on my ABAP Cloud project in eclipse. I am getting the following error : Error while logging on the service instance using this project. Please make sure that you are logging on with : my email address. Although I simultaneously get the following message im Browser:  You have been successfully logged on: You can close this page and continue in the ABAP Development Tools. 

The trial account has only one E-mail Address. 

Yesterday, it was working perfectly but I tried the wohle day to relog in eclipse , restart it , restart windows, deleted the data in cache. But nothing seems to work unfortuantly. 

Thanks in advance

Best regards 

sisi

entry.title: Re: SAP Disclosure Management for EFRAG taxonomy
entry.content:
Dear Andrea,

Yes, you can tag a concept with as many dimension as you like.

Regarding the second criteria, I'm not sure what you mean.

Do you mean an expression for a boolean concept (yes or no) ?

Regards,

Guido

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a SAP Query Transaction from another report and import to it the data?
entry.content: Did you try to use FM RSAQ_QUERY_CALL or RSAQ_REMOTE_QUERY_CALL to execute the query, there is an option to export result to memory (actually an exported parameter of type ref to).

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors LMS Program - Can I add courses to an...
entry.content: @CharlesGirdwood thanks, only one concern, if they have completed it already, they will be reassigned, and they will do just the new item. Perfect, but wouldnt this be a duplicated certification?

entry.title: Re: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content:
If you actually want a constant value, try to add your code in methods OPEN to initialize value) and PROCESS_HEADER (cancel user input)

NB: POST method shouldn't change data, CHECK is the last one allowed.

entry.title: Re: Doubt - SAP IBP Cost Roll Up calculation
entry.content: Thanks for the input, I wasn't taking into account the aggregation transportation costs withinn the other supply chain nodes, now it makes sense. So, as I understand it, I should always make the cost analysis starting from the supplier and then to the plant with the customer demand need, right? Another question, how does the cost roll up profile takes into account the projected stock? For example, if I have in the last period a projected stock of 100 and this period I have Total Receipt=300 and NAGCSTTRANSPORTATIONCOST=500. Thanks, Elena

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Form Cell Header reference
entry.content: @sk_ramkumar Could you open a feature request on influence site to track your requirement? https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2279

entry.title: Re: FB60 does not post. No error message is displayed.
entry.content:
The error doesn't point to a missing value, but a forgotten dynpro in your recording/BDC.

  • Try to execute the BDC in 'E' or 'A' mode.

entry.title: Input Control Sizing Not Working
entry.content:
Sizing not working for input control. I need to make the width a % as I have done before, however the option is greyed out.

See image below

entry.title: Re: Table for Payment Terms
entry.content: T052U (table) or I_PaymentTermsConditionsText (CDS) for descriptions.

entry.title: Re: User exit in S/4HANA Public Cloud（COMD）
entry.content: Thank you for providing an answer to my question. I really appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content: Thanks, but is not a constant value, it should be set before saving.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content:
Regards venkatesh

Speaking of master data, Cut Over activities depend on the changes you made.

If you only added attributes, it is just a matter of importing the changes to production and loading the new data. If it is a delta load, the new field will begin to fill little by little.

If you modified existing attributes (for example, data type change) you must validate that these attributes are not used in cubes/ADSO so that you can import your changes. If it exists in a cube/ADSO, you must first delete the content of the cubes to be able to import the changes (due to SIDS management issues).

I hope to be helpful. Greetings.

BR Oscar A.

entry.title: Re: Unable to print a billing document (AdobeForms) in VF02
entry.content: Though you confirmed that all SAP notes are there in system, when checked in Service Marketplace, I could see 8 notes are there related to this Message text.  Do you mean to say all these 8 Notes are implemented.  If not, check which one is missing and if needed, raise a ticket to SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM MFS Receiving and Processing Telegrams
entry.content:
@TobiasAdler: Do you have any experience with using RFC 1006 "Iso on TCP". Is EWM MFS compatible  with it ? In my understanding the ABAP Push Channel is compatible with the protocol.

The EWM MFS component i guess not. Therfore the Message handling needs to extendend. Like in method /SCWM/CL_APC_EXT_MFS_TCP_PLC->IF_APC_WSP_EXTENSION~ON_MESSAGE.

entry.title: Re: Usage of Custom Destination Service in BTP, ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hey @Koni,

Thanks for your comment.

You can run this ABAP Code in an ABAP Environment on the BTP, there you always program in ABAP Cloud programming model. Here is a collection of links that show you how to setup an ABAP environment in a trial account and run your own code:

Learn how to develop in ABAP using SAP BTP ABAP En... - SAP Community

Basically you can run this type of code in an application job, in an action of a RAP BO or in an ADT Class Runner.

if you want to use this code in consuming an OData service, check out this post: Usage of Expand Entity in OData Service Consumptio... - SAP Community

alrikx

entry.title: Auto close/update all open Notifications work orders and maintenance plans for Decommissioned asset
entry.content: How we can achieve this please let me know

entry.title: Re: Sales order line item rejected even though MTO Produc...
entry.content: Yes, it has the same requirements type on the sales order and it has the same assembly type assigned

entry.title: Providing As-a-Service with Software-as-a-Service - give us feedback
entry.content:
Software-as-a-Service has emerged to be the main monetization model for software companies. Newer software companies, such as Leadsquare, would not even consider to provide their competence by selling perpetual licenses. The key requirement for all companies launching SaaS is to be quick, efficient and automated while still agile to change and adapt. Can the solution deal with different subscription models? Is it able to provide subscriptions with other one-off products or service in a bundle? Will the revenue recognition be compliant to local standards? We at SAP strive to provide enterprise ressource planning from the cloud with true SaaS qualities, that provides the management of subscriptions. 

Let us know about your subscription business: Are you running SAP for it? What can we do better? What shall we keep? What do you really like about our solution?

Thank you in advance !

Axel Vetter

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content:
In the above WWI code.

I am pushing the specification number using stack push.

Then in my custom FM I am reading the stack top to get back the spec number.

I want to debug my custom FM to check some part of logic, since it is not giving the expected result.

I have add  external and session breakpoint in STACK PUSH FM

I have also add break point statement and external and session breakpoint in my custom FM.

When I click on the display document as explained earlier debugger gets triggered for the stack push FM but my custom FM is not being triggered.

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content: Hello @Christoph_bergemann.

entry.title: Re: Unable to debug Custom function module in CG54.
entry.content: I have added my explanation in answer section please check and help me on the same.

entry.title: Re: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content:
1. It doesn't seem to be possible to be actively informed about errors (e.g. in case of failed status) and to set up any scheduled reports
-> That means it seems to be necessary to login to CIG on a regular basis and manually search for documents or download the list in excel [Mridul: Thats correct, as of now, CIG doesn't provide option to schedule any reports or jobs to get the list of error/transactions etc.]

2. If you download a list of documents, the error message in case of failed status is not part of the list at all
-> You can only see document errors by using mouseover function for each document. This highly increases the analysis effort [Mridul: I agree list doesn't provide details about failed transaction. I would suggest raising Enhancement Request with SAP]

3. It is not possible to do any kind of clearing in CIG (delete / obsolete failed documents)
-> That means it is impossible to keep track of which documents have been already cleaned up and which still require attention [Mridul: I didn't your questions, are you are saying once transaction is reprocessed, you can see audit history of this transaction ID?]

4. Maximum document number to be downloaded in excel is 5000
-> currently we exchange already more than 5000 documents per day. As we just have migrated 25% of our suppliers to CIG, this number will extremely grow. We can't download a list several times a day to track documents.  [Mridul: Considering the performance to run heavy queries, product team designed to limit 5000 documents in one excel export run]

entry.title: Question about notification in SAPS/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for example, when the new products are being added into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how would the customer be notified they have to add the price to the added materials and also the sales price to it?

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales MM (Materials Management) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to the find the usage of a Fiori app from the bac...
entry.content:
In my opinion, Focused Run / Real User Monitoring (SAP Focused Run Expert Portal) provides good insights.

I'm not experienced how to find a comparable insight with other tooling such as transactions ST03N (2629143 - Best practices to gather Fiori usage statistics for on-premise systems - SAP for Me), STATS_FE (Use Transaction STATS_FE to Analyze the Performance of your Web Application) or STMC (Technical Monitoring in the ABAP Platform | SAP Help Portal). 

Kind regards, Bas

entry.title: Re: Unable to print a billing document (AdobeForms) in VF02
entry.content: Can you check for relevant notes (to the message) not yet implemented?

entry.title: Re: Change header field of purchase order on save
entry.content: Then post your actual code in the CHECK method

entry.title: Activate API - Provider API to Create Freight Order for Subcontracting
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

I need to activate the standard API for Provider API to Create Freight Order for Subcontracting.

api.sap.com/api/TransportationOrderRequest_Out/overview

Kindly explain me how to do it.

 

Regards,

Tamilselvan

entry.title: Re: How to Pass slash(/) in Odata service
entry.content:
Encode that part of the URI

ttps://www.w3.org/Addressing/URL/4_URI_Recommentations.html

entry.title: You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I created (or better) copied an interface from z-namespace to customer-namespace in BTP ABAP Environment.

I cannot activate or delete the object and get an error message "You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)". I checked also note https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3303363. I have all write permissions and the ABAP Language is "ABAP for Cloud Development". I can see that the Transport Request is "Local".

This is wrong and may cause the problem. When checking the correct TR, I can see the object

Does anyone know, how to solve this issue?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Why Don't We Use Data and Analytics Group on SAP Community?
entry.content:
Hey Data and Analytics Folks! Why Don't We Use Data and Analytics Group on SAP Community instead of Technology?

Of course, it does not matter at the end. As long as if you tag your posts with SAP Managed tags everybody can find your posts. But there is a really one huge difference for usability that here in Interests Groups we can reply-the-reply but under Products and Technology we cannot! Check out this blog post SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW by @kenneth_dalvik and all responses that are very all boring sequential --there is no reply-the-reply option! 🙃

So let's start using this group Here is already available Data and Analytics.   The group will be definitely a perfect fit for SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud, hybrid analytics SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity SAP Analytics Cloud, analytics designer SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics SAP Business Planning and Consolidation, version for SAP NetWeaver SAP Business Warehouse Accelerator BW (SAP Business Warehouse) SAP BW/4HANA BW SAP BEx Analyzer BW SAP BEx Web SAP ASE - BW Enablement BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing SAP Data Services SAP Data Intelligence SAP Data Custodian SAP Big Data Services SAP BusinessObjects - Platform Administration SAP BusinessObjects - Semantic Layer SAP BusinessObjects Mobile SAP BusinessObjects - Semantic Layer - SDK SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI) 

These are welcome too SAP Master Data Governance SAP NetWeaver Master Data Management SAP Data Quality Management for SAP NetWeaver MDM 

One thing I've noticed we cannot submit the blog posts directly. We need to "Submit for Review" only. You can still post discussions aka questions directly. 

Thanks owners @ColinC, @meganhoy, @moshenaveh, @caroleighdeneen, @craigcmehil for their support!

Regards,
Tuncay Karaca

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP - Job launch suggestion
entry.content:
Hi Gerardo,

Thank you for the nice idea!

May I kindly ask you to enter this in our customer influence tool for IBP. That way other customers can view it and vote on your idea. If it receives many votes it will be considered for implementation.

You can find our tool here for submitting new ideas:
Influence Opportunity Homepage - Customer Influence - SAP IBP

Thanks and regards,
Zoltan.

entry.title: Re: How long do I need to wait for a blog post that I submitted for review in Data and Analytics gro
entry.content: Hi @TuncayKaraca , it is now published 🙂

entry.title: Re: CCM - Settlement to multiple agents - No Supplier to...
entry.content:
Hi Kmrharish,

Check your entries for accrual posting at the time of billing document posting. 
I don't have access to your system but I guess the system is trying to reverse the accrual and create a settlement document which is not linked to any of the supplier you're using. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: CIG transaction tracker handling
entry.content: Mridul hello. Thanks for the feedback but the customer influence way is useless, there is already ton of CIs created by other customer on the same topics and nothing has never moved. That's what is called "listening to your customer" lol

entry.title: Re: Scheduling parameters usage & what is forward schedul...
entry.content:
Hi Arif,

Kindly google it out and you will find enormous threads for the topics you are covered. 

Sample: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/scheduling-types-in-pm-order/qaq-p/8484475

Additionally, there is a documentation in each Config node, which will give the information what you are looking for .

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Meas points not showing up in IW42 even when linked t...
entry.content: Did you assigned the functional location in the Operation. Check whether the order operation PRT, the measuring points are available

entry.title: Re: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content: Thanks alot for the answer @Oscar_Alberto We just added an extra field and populating the data using code in CMOD. So no need to locking the users in production like we do for 2lis extractors?? And no queue RSA7 clearance activity right??? My master data datasource is a delta one

entry.title: Re: S/4Hana Cloud Event Trigger an Iflow in Sap Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello, this 4 week old Blog by a SAP employee proposes using SAP 'Event Mesh' classic, but it would appear that this Service has been stealthily retired since :

https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/serviceCatalog/event-mesh?region=all

Is it possible that SAP has retired 'Event Mesh' classic in the past week or so without even the knowledge of its own employees ?

entry.title: Re: Release Question: Comparing Previous Months
entry.content: Hi Jim, I will make sure this gets addressed in the next APM user group meeting (if not before).
